---
title: "ICD2O Data Analysis Pathway"
---

## Purpose

This Quarto site is a curated published view of the repository.
The existing Markdown pages and notebooks remain the main files to edit.
Quarto sits on top of those files so the repo can work as both a planning workspace and a teacher-facing site.

## Recommended Flow

Use the materials in this order:

1. Open the [Project Plan](Project%20Plan%20Team%202.md) for the current sequence, scope, and curriculum alignment.
2. Read the relevant lesson plan in `lessons/`.
3. Open the companion tutorial for the detailed teaching script and beginner explanations.
4. Run the notebook if the lesson includes one.
5. Use or adapt the assignment after the guided learning sequence.

## Current Pathway

### Lesson 00

- [Lesson 00 Lesson Plan](lessons/00-data-analysis-big-picture-lesson-plan.md)
- [Lesson 00 Tutorial](lessons/00-data-analysis-big-picture-tutorial.md)
- [Lesson 00 Assignment](lessons/00-data-analysis-big-picture-assignment.md)

### Lesson 01

- [Lesson 01 Lesson Plan](lessons/01-jupyter-notebooks-foundations-lesson-plan.md)
- [Lesson 01 Tutorial](lessons/01-jupyter-notebooks-foundations-tutorial.md)

### Lesson 02

- [Lesson 02 Lesson Plan](lessons/02-extreme-heat-events-lesson-plan.md)
- [Lesson 02 Tutorial](lessons/02-extreme-heat-events-tutorial.md)
- [Lesson 02 Notebook](notebooks/csv/02-extreme-heat-events-exploration.ipynb)

## Key References

- [Repository Guide](README.md)
- [Student And Teacher Manual](references/student-teacher-manual.md)
- [Dataset Links](references/dataset-links.md)
- [Expectations Compliance](references/expectations-compliance.md)
- [PACT Framework](references/pact-framework.md)

## Notes For Editors

- Keep editing the existing `.md` and `.ipynb` files directly.
- If the lesson sequence changes, update the Quarto sidebar in `_quarto.yml` in the same pass.
- Only the curated teaching and planning pages are included in the site. Internal workflow files remain repo-only.
